description:
Returns an array of all currently placed [[Eden Entity|Eden Editor entities]].
{{Feature|Eden Editor|This information is only available in [[:Category:Eden Editor|Eden Editor]]. If used during mission, it will return {{hl|[[],[],[],[],[],[],[],[-999]]}}.}}
examples:
<sqf>
// select all Eden entities
set3DENSelected all3DENEntities;
</sqf>
name: all3DENEntities
